summary: Comprehensive testing of 3-role system (Federation, Society, Hiker) completed successfully. All 23 backend API tests passed. All frontend flows tested and working correctly including auth, role-based navigation, role-based routing protection, society approval workflow, activity management, and map/explore pages.

issues: Dropdown uses Shadcn Select which requires keyboard navigation or force click - minor UX friction

passed_tests: Backend: API root returns 200
Backend: Stats endpoint returns total_zones, active_zones, total_users, total_routes
Backend: Constants endpoint returns species, weight_ranges, participant_roles, auth_types
Backend: Federation login with federacion@rangeguard.com / federacion2024
Backend: Federation wrong password returns 401
Backend: Federation /auth/me returns user data without password_hash
Backend: Hiker registration/login with senderista@test.com / test1234
Backend: Hiker blocked from /federation/societies (403)
Backend: Hiker blocked from creating activities (403)
Backend: Society registration/login with sociedad@test.com / test1234
Backend: Society blocked from /federation/societies (403)
Backend: Federation can list all societies
Backend: Federation can approve societies
Backend: Federation can list all activities
Backend: Federation can filter pending activities
Backend: Society can list own activities
Backend: Society can create draft activity
Backend: Society can get regular participants
Backend: Society can add regular participant
Backend: Zones endpoint returns approved activities as zones
Backend: Public routes endpoint works
Backend: Unauthenticated requests blocked (401)
Backend: Invalid tokens rejected (401)
Frontend: Landing page loads with stats (3 Zonas Activas, 10 Usuarios, 7 Rutas)
Frontend: Login/Register buttons visible in navbar
Frontend: Map and Explore links visible for unauthenticated users
Frontend: Federation login redirects to /federation
Frontend: Federation dashboard shows title, stats, Actividades and Sociedades tabs
Frontend: Federation Sociedades tab shows registered societies with approval status
Frontend: Hiker login redirects to /map
Frontend: Hiker navbar shows Mapa, Explorar Rutas, Mis Rutas
Frontend: Society login redirects to /society
Frontend: Society dashboard shows activity management with filters
Frontend: Society can navigate to Nueva Actividad form
Frontend: Activity form shows all required fields (tipo, coto, responsable, fecha, especies, participantes)
Frontend: Society can navigate to Participantes Habituales page
Frontend: Regular participants page shows list with edit/delete buttons
Frontend: Map page loads with Leaflet map and 6 active zones
Frontend: Explore page loads with 7 public routes and map
Frontend: Role-based routing - Society redirected from /routes to /society
Frontend: Role-based routing - Hiker redirected from /society to /map
Frontend: Role-based routing - Hiker redirected from /federation to /map
Frontend: New society registration shows pending approval message
critical_code_review_comments: AdminPage.js still exists in frontend but is not used - can be deleted for cleanup
ESLint warnings about missing 'headers' dependency in useCallback hooks in FederationDashboard.js, SocietyDashboard.js, RegularParticipantsPage.js - minor issue
seed_data_creation: Created test activity 'Test Coto 8eee4d' and regular participant 'Participante Test be1d' during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3-role system fully tested and working. Federation can manage societies and activities. Society can create activities and manage participants. Hiker can view map and explore routes. Role-based routing protects all routes correctly. New society registration shows pending approval state until federation approves.
